subcodes.first_line: This is the remembrance of God from the Tree of Eternity: O concourse of Paradise, hearken, that all who are in the heavens may remember [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره الخلد ان یا ملا الفردوس فاسمعون لیتذکر به کل من فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @nearness and remoteness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
